subject: omnibus option template for paper deals

emails.subject: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals
emails.subject_base: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals
emails.body: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals Hey Sara, Would you please look over this omnibus option template that I took from TAGG and modify it as you see fit for the Paper World? Many thanks, Lucy P.S. This particular deal is for a paper DRAFT, but I thought we should have the template in place anyway. For future deals of course.

emails.subject: Re: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals
emails.subject_base: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals
emails.body: Re: Omnibus Option Template for Paper Deals Is that desk doing options (NOT SWAPTIONS!)? Why are you asking? There are many issues on the paper desk regarding options. Sara Lucy Ortiz 07/08/99 11:03 AM
